mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id as parentId, m.menu_name as menuName, m.menu_type as menuType, m.path, m.component, m.permission, m.icon, m.sort_order as sortOrder, m.visible, m.status, m.created_by as createdBy, m.created_time as createdTime, m.updated_by as updatedBy, m.updated_time as updatedTime, m.deleted FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 1 AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.visible = 1 ORDER BY m.sort_order ASC, m.id ASC

SELECT m.id, m.parent_id as parentId, m.menu_name as menuName, m.menu_type as menuType, m.path, m.component, m.permission, m.icon, m.sort_order as sortOrder, m.visible, m.status, m.created_by as createdBy, m.created_time as createdTime, m.updated_by as updatedBy, m.updated_time as updatedTime, m.deleted FROM sys_menu m WHERE m.deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.sort_order ASC, m.id ASC

SELECT m.id, m.parent_id as parentId, m.menu_name as menuName, m.menu_type as menuType, m.path, m.component, m.permission, m.icon, m.sort_order as sortOrder, m.visible, m.status, m.created_by as createdBy, m.created_time as createdTime, m.updated_by as updatedBy, m.updated_time as updatedTime, m.deleted FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} AND m.status = 1 AND m.deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.sort_order ASC, m.id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_role_menu (role_id, menu_id, created_time) VALUES
(#{roleId}, #{menuId}, NOW())
